result: The cleaned dataset has been successfully created and saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv. The output contains 16,111 observations and 17 variables: NSID, collapsed tenure variables (hown14, hown15, hown16, hown17, hown18, hown19, hown20, hown25, hown32), and detailed adolescent tenure variables (hownteen14, hownteen15, hownteen16, hownteen17, hownteen18, hownteen19, hownteen20). All missing value codes have been standardized according to the metadata specifications.
